name: Linear Guides
rationale: Existing ZOLLERN market. Cleanest constraint profile (0 knockouts). ZOLLERN wins on 9/20 needs (dimensional consistency, hardness uniformity, traceability) but loses on 6 high-magnitude flexibility/sourcing needs. Net weighted delta -20. Physics-driven advantages vs. structural die-model friction.
entryStrategy: Reference only - existing market. Leverage die library for repeat geometries; mitigate sole-source risk via die escrow.
